title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content: Open the CultPass app, select an experience, and tap Reserve. For premium or limited events, users might need email confirmation. Ask users to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code ready.

title: What's Included in a CultPass Subscription
content: A standard subscription includes 4 cultural experiences per month such as museums, concerts, and screenings. Premium experiences may require an additional fee displayed in-app before confirmation.

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content: Users can go to My Account, then Manage Plan. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the billing cycle. Pausing keeps account data and can be resumed later. Refunds require support-lead approval.

title: How to Handle Login Issues
content: Direct users to Forgot Password, verify registered email, and ask them to check spam if reset email is missing. If issue continues after retries, escalate to human support.

title: How to Update Payment Method
content: Users can update card details from My Account > Billing > Payment Methods. Changes apply to the next billing attempt. If payment keeps failing, advise checking bank authorization.

title: Monthly Quota Not Refreshing
content: The monthly quota refreshes automatically at the start of each billing cycle. If a user sees stale quota, verify active subscription status and ask them to refresh the app session.

title: Reservation Not Showing in App
content: If a reservation is missing, verify confirmation email and booking timestamp. Ask user to pull-to-refresh and relogin. If still missing, escalate with user_id and experience title.

title: How to Transfer a Reservation
content: Reservations are non-transferable by default. Users should cancel and rebook if slots are available. For exceptional accessibility cases, escalate to operations.

title: Blocked Account Policy
content: Blocked accounts cannot place new reservations. Agents should confirm block reason in account tooling and escalate if user disputes a compliance-related block.

title: Premium Experience Access Rules
content: Premium experiences are available to eligible tiers or with additional charges. Agents should check subscription tier and event premium flag before confirming access.

title: App Crashes During Checkout
content: Collect app version, device model, and operating system. Ask user to clear cache or reinstall app. If crash persists, escalate to technical support with diagnostics.

title: Delayed Confirmation Email
content: Confirmation emails can be delayed up to 10 minutes during peak traffic. Ask users to check spam and retry. If no email after 15 minutes, escalate with ticket details.

title: Duplicate Charges Investigation
content: If users report duplicate charges, capture charge timestamps and last four digits of card, then escalate to billing investigations. Do not promise immediate refunds before review.

title: How to Change Notification Preferences
content: Users can open Settings > Notifications to manage email and push preferences. Preference updates can take a few minutes to propagate across devices.
